description_long: This is a small, single-engine military-style jet airplane with a streamlined gray fuselage and red accents on the nose, wing tips, and tail. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings, each bearing roundels and insignia, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, appearing to accommodate two seats in tandem. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a visible nose wheel and main gear under the wings. Markings and insignia suggest military or training use, and the overall design is compact and aerodynamic. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with painted details and minimal surface texture.
description: A compact, gray military-style jet airplane with red accents, low straight wings, and a forward enclosed cockpit. Features include a tricycle landing gear and distinctive roundel markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, red-tipped wings, forward cockpit, and visible nose wheel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, straight wings, and jet exhaust; landing gear is less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the cockpit, wing, and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit canopy, wing span, and red accents on the nose and wing tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with tandem seating and a clear canopy.
